mapper.select: SELECT equipment_log.equip_num, equipment_log.equip_status, equipment_log.error_sign, equipment_log.equip_action, equipment_log.maintenance_date, equipment_log.start_date, equipment_log.end_date, equipment_log.total_runtime, item.item_num, item.code, item.name, emp.emp_num, emp.ename FROM equipment_log JOIN item ON equipment_log.item_num = item.item_num JOIN emp ON equipment_log.emp_num = emp.emp_num ORDER BY equipment_log.maintenance_date DESC

SELECT equipment_log.equip_num, equipment_log.equip_status, equipment_log.error_sign, equipment_log.equip_action, equipment_log.maintenance_date, equipment_log.start_date, equipment_log.end_date, equipment_log.total_runtime, item.item_num, item.code, item.name, emp.emp_num, emp.ename FROM equipment_log JOIN item ON equipment_log.item_num = item.item_num JOIN emp ON equipment_log.emp_num = emp.emp_num
AND equipment_log.item_num = #{type}
AND upper(item.name) LIKE ('%' || upper(#{keyword}) || '%')
ORDER BY equipment_log.maintenance_date DESC
SELECT item_num, code, name FROM item WHERE "TYPE" = 'EQUIP'
mapper.update: UPDATE equipment_log e SET total_runtime = ( SELECT SUM( ROUND((e2.end_date - e2.start_date) * 86400) ) FROM equipment_log e2 WHERE e2.item_num = e.item_num )
